description_long: This is a single-story bungalow with a rectangular footprint, surrounded by a fenced yard featuring both paved and grassy areas. The structure is primarily white, with multiple windows distributed along the longer facades, and a main entrance facing a paved walkway. The roof is flat, and the building appears to have a modern, minimalist design with clean lines and simple geometry. The front yard includes a small landscaped section with a few shrubs or low plants, while the backyard is open and grassy. The windows are arranged in a mostly symmetrical pattern, and the exterior walls are smooth and light-colored. The overall setting suggests a suburban or urban residential context, with the bungalow designed for comfortable single-family living.
description: A modern, single-story white bungalow with a flat roof, surrounded by a fenced yard with both paved and grassy areas. The building features multiple windows and a landscaped front section.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, paved walkway, and a landscaped area with shrubs beside the house.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the long, white facade with several windows and the fenced backyard area.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the grassy backyard and the back side of the bungalow with additional windows.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the paved front yard, main entrance, and a clear view of the window arrangement.
attribute_window_arrangement: symmetrical front-facing windows with additional side and rear windows
